query:
-- Seed general_food_reference with common foods for manual input suggestions
INSERT INTO general_food_reference (name, aliases, category, defaultServingGram, caloriesPer100g, proteinPer100g, carbsPer100g, fatsPer100g) VALUES

-- Proteins
('雞胸肉', '["chicken breast", "chicken", "雞", "鷄胸"]', 'Protein', 100, 165, 31, 0, 3.6),
('牛肉', '["beef", "牛", "牛肉"]', 'Protein', 100, 250, 26, 0, 15),
('豬肉', '["pork", "豬", "猪肉"]', 'Protein', 100, 242, 27, 0, 14),
('魚', '["fish", "鱼", "魚", "三文魚", "salmon"]', 'Protein', 100, 208, 20, 0, 13),
('蛋', '["egg", "雞蛋", "鷄蛋", "蛋"]', 'Protein', 50, 155, 13, 1.1, 11),
('豆腐', '["tofu", "豆腐"]', 'Protein', 100, 76, 8, 1.9, 4.8),
('牛奶', '["milk", "牛奶", "鮮奶"]', 'Dairy', 200, 61, 3.2, 4.8, 3.3),
('乳酪', '["cheese", "芝士", "乳酪"]', 'Dairy', 30, 402, 25, 1.3, 33),

-- Carbs
('米飯', '["rice", "白米", "米", "米飯"]', 'Carbs', 150, 130, 2.7, 28, 0.3),
('麵包', '["bread", "麵包", "面包"]', 'Carbs', 50, 265, 9, 49, 3.3),
('麵條', '["noodles", "麵", "面条", "pasta"]', 'Carbs', 100, 131, 3.7, 25, 1.1),
('馬鈴薯', '["potato", "薯", "馬鈴薯"]', 'Carbs', 150, 77, 2, 17, 0.1),
('番薯', '["sweet potato", "番薯", "紅薯"]', 'Carbs', 100, 86, 1.6, 20, 0.1),
('燕麥', '["oats", "燕麥", "燕麦"]', 'Carbs', 40, 389, 17, 66, 7),

-- Vegetables
('西蘭花', '["broccoli", "西蘭花", "西兰花"]', 'Vegetable', 100, 34, 2.8, 7, 0.4),
('菠菜', '["spinach", "菠菜"]', 'Vegetable', 100, 23, 2.9, 3.6, 0.4),
('番茄', '["tomato", "番茄", "西紅柿"]', 'Vegetable', 100, 18, 0.9, 3.9, 0.2),
('胡蘿蔔', '["carrot", "胡蘿蔔", "胡萝卜"]', 'Vegetable', 100, 41, 0.9, 10, 0.2),
('黃瓜', '["cucumber", "黃瓜", "黄瓜"]', 'Vegetable', 100, 16, 0.7, 3.6, 0.1),
('生菜', '["lettuce", "生菜"]', 'Vegetable', 100, 15, 1.2, 2.9, 0.2),

-- Fruits
('蘋果', '["apple", "蘋果", "苹果"]', 'Fruit', 100, 52, 0.3, 14, 0.2),
('香蕉', '["banana", "香蕉"]', 'Fruit', 100, 89, 1.1, 23, 0.3),
('橙', '["orange", "橙", "柳橙"]', 'Fruit', 100, 47, 0.9, 12, 0.3),
('葡萄', '["grape", "葡萄", "葡萄"]', 'Fruit', 100, 67, 0.6, 17, 0.4),
('莓', '["berry", "莓", "藍莓", "草莓"]', 'Fruit', 100, 57, 0.7, 14, 0.3);
